system_prompt: You are a research assistant. Use the wikipedia tools to answer the user's question. When you have the answer, call finish(answer=...).
user_prompt: Who directed the 2007 film which  Sasson Gabai won an Ophir Award for?

tool_schemas.name: search_wikipedia
tool_schemas.description: Search Wikipedia for page titles matching a query. Returns up to 5 {title, snippet} results.

tool_schemas.name: get_wiki_page
tool_schemas.description: Fetch a Wikipedia page by exact title. Returns {title, summary, text}. If the page does not exist, returns {error: 'not_found', title}.

tool_schemas.name: finish
tool_schemas.description: Submit the final short answer to the user's question.
